subject: New Opening: Software Engineer
body:
Hi,

Hope you're having a good day! I'm reaching out about a new request from one of our clients.

Bankry (fintech) is looking for a lead Software Engineer for a contract assignment.

Assignment details:

  • Start: 2024-07-26
  • Duration: 6 months
  • Location: Stockholm (hybrid)
  • Rate: up to 1125 SEK/h

Required tech:

  • Java
  • GCP
  • MongoDB

Feel free to reach out if you or someone in your network might be a good match!

Best regards,
Emma Andersson
Recruitment Consultant
Nexum Consulting
Tel: +46 76 901 23 45
